records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd heard you were looking for Lurcher, so Shepherd came too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd heard you were looking for Lurcher, so Shepherd came too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd heard you were looking for Lurcher, so Shepherd came too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lurcher can't talk, so Shepherd will help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lurcher can't talk, so Shepherd will help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lurcher can't talk, so Shepherd will help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lurcher claims that your offer is an unreasonable exploitation of labor that is biased and unethical.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lurcher claims that your offer is an unreasonable exploitation of labor that is biased and unethical.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lurcher claims that your offer is an unreasonable exploitation of labor that is biased and unethical.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you try to use the stupid Shepherd to make me work, I'll chomp you! KRAAAWR!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you try to use the stupid Shepherd to make me work, I'll chomp you! KRAAAWR!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you try to use the stupid Shepherd to make me work, I'll chomp you! KRAAAWR!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lurcher... You shouldn't say such bad things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lurcher... You shouldn't say such bad things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lurcher... You shouldn't say such bad things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Boss is not trying to use us. He likes us, so he wants to help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Boss is not trying to use us. He likes us, so he wants to help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Boss is not trying to use us. He likes us, so he wants to help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since Lurcher has no hands, Shepherd will sign here for it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since Lurcher has no hands, Shepherd will sign here for it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since Lurcher has no hands, Shepherd will sign here for it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lurcher, this isn't your signature, is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lurcher, this isn't your signature, is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lurcher, this isn't your signature, is it?
